channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs SSD internes (M.2 NVMe) pour PC en 2026 ?
item.description: Les SSD M.2, compacts et ultra-rapides, transforment les performances de votre PC de bureau ou de votre PS5. Bienvenue sur notre sélection des meilleurs modèles de SSD internes pour tirer le maximum de vitesse et de réactivité de votre système.

item.title: I put the MacBook Neo through the same tests as I did the MacBook Air M1 — I think the results will surprise you
item.description: Is the MacBook Neo the Apple MacBook Air M1 replacement you've been waiting for? We have your answer.

item.title: Apple considered buying Halide to upgrade its native Camera app
item.description: A legal feud between the co-founders of Lux Optics, the developer behind the Halide camera app, revealed that Apple was close to acquiring the company. As first reported by The Information, Apple held acquisition talks for Lux Optics, which also developed the Kino, Spectre and Orion apps, in the summer of 2025. According to The Information, the deal eventually fell through in September of that year, but the potential acquisition could've provided Apple with the third-party software to improve its own built-in camera app. Apple is already rumored to be introducing variable aperture to its upcom...

item.title: A Minecraft theme park will open in London in 2027
item.description: The best-selling game of all time is moving from the virtual to the physical. Minecraft World, a permanent Greater London theme park based on the game, is scheduled to open in 2027. The announcement came during Minecraft Live 2026.It will be a new section in Chessington World of Adventures, a theme park with a built-in zoo. The resort is a 35-minute train ride from London's Waterloo station.Details are still fairly light on the park. But we know it will include a roller coaster, "interactive adventures" and "epic block-built playscapes." Torfi Frans Ólafsson, the game franchise's creative dire...

item.title: 'We should regard it as a privilege to be stepping stones to higher things': How Arthur C Clarke predicted the rise of AGI and the looming demise of humanity back in 1964
item.description: From loose ideas of 3D printing to artificial general intelligence (AGI), Arthur C. Clarke made some spooky predictions way back in 1964

item.title: Gemini, Crypto.com Latest Crypto Firms to Blame Downsizing on AI
item.description: Meanwhile, some companies have abandoned crypto entirely to focus on the higher profits available in AI.

item.title: Delve accused of misleading customers with ‘fake compliance’
item.description: An anonymous Substack post accuses compliance startup Delve of “falsely” convincing “hundreds of customers they were compliant” with privacy and security regulations.

item.title: The AirPods Pro 3 are $50 off right now, nearly matching their best-ever price
item.description: Less than a week ago, Apple announced the forthcoming AirPods Max 2, a pair of over-ear headphones that leverage the company’s H2 chip for AI-powered live translation, conversation awareness, and a host of newer features. However, if you’re okay with a pair of earbuds, the AirPods Pro 3 offer access to all the same features […]

item.title: I've been seriously impressed by the Acer Predator Helios Neo 16S AI, and now it's discounted by $350
item.description: The Acer Predator Helios Neo 16S AI has its price cut to $1,549.99 at Best Buy

item.title: How to watch Arsenal vs. Manchester City in the EFL Cup final online for free
item.description: How to watch EFL Cup final for free. Live stream Arsenal vs. Manchester City in the EFL Cup final for free.
